reference: I had root canal treatment three weeks ago, and since then, I cannot eat without experiencing pain and aching in my jaw. Additionally, the side of my face is numb. I went to see the dentist a week ago, and he said it was not related to the root canal. If the symptoms persist, he will have to refer me. I am going back to see him tomorrow, but I need to understand what can be done.
